parameters.query:
USE {{$json["db"]}};
SET LANGUAGE Spanish
select  
    DB_NAME() as dbname,
     -- Normalización de Pais: elimina cualquier número al final
    RTRIM(
        LEFT(
            RIGHT(DB_NAME(), LEN(DB_NAME()) - CHARINDEX('_', DB_NAME())),
            PATINDEX('%[0-9]%', RIGHT(DB_NAME(), LEN(DB_NAME()) - CHARINDEX('_', DB_NAME())) + '0') - 1)    ) AS Pais,
     -- Normalización de Entorno
    CASE 
        WHEN RIGHT(DB_NAME(), 1) LIKE '[0-9]' 
            THEN 'APP' + RIGHT(DB_NAME(), 1)
        WHEN RIGHT(DB_NAME(), LEN(DB_NAME()) - CHARINDEX('_', DB_NAME())) = 'CINES' 
            THEN 'CINES'
        ELSE 'APP'
    END AS Entorno,
    YEAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, GETDATE())) as anio, MONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, GETDATE())) as mes,
 
Procesados.MesTexto,  procesados , 
CASE WHEN aprobados is null THEN 0 ELSE aprobados END as aprobados,
CASE WHEN aprobados is null THEN procesados ELSE procesados-aprobados END as Erroneos,
 
CASE 
    WHEN aprobados IS NULL THEN '0%'
    WHEN aprobados = 0 THEN '100%'
    ELSE 
        FORMAT((procesados - aprobados) * 1.0 / procesados, 'P2', 'es-AR')
    END AS PorcentajeError
 
 
from 
(select DATENAME(mm, convert(varchar,YEAR(t.Fecha))+'-'+ right('00'+convert(varchar,MONTH(t.Fecha)),2) +'-01') as MesTexto,
        COUNT(c.NroCbte) as procesados
        from comprobante as C
        inner join Transaccion as T on (c.CuitId=t.CuitId and c.TransaccionId=t.TransaccionId)
        where year( t.Fecha) = YEAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, GETDATE()))
        and month( t.Fecha) = MONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, GETDATE()))
    group by  DATENAME(mm, convert(varchar,YEAR(t.Fecha))+'-'+ right('00'+convert(varchar,MONTH(t.Fecha)),2) +'-01')
) as Procesados
 
left join 
(select DATENAME(mm, convert(varchar,YEAR(t.Fecha))+'-'+ right('00'+convert(varchar,MONTH(t.Fecha)),2) +'-01') as MesTexto,
        COUNT(c.NroCbte) as Aprobados
        from comprobante as C
        inner join Transaccion as T on (c.CuitId=t.CuitId and c.TransaccionId=t.TransaccionId)
        where year( t.Fecha) = YEAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, GETDATE()))
        and month( t.Fecha) = MONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, GETDATE()))
        and c.Resultado !='R'
    group by  DATENAME(mm, convert(varchar,YEAR(t.Fecha))+'-'+ right('00'+convert(varchar,MONTH(t.Fecha)),2) +'-01')
) as Aprobados
 
on 
procesados.MesTexto= aprobados.MesTexto

USE {{$json["db"]}};
SET LANGUAGE Spanish
select  
    DB_NAME() as dbname,
     -- Normalización de Pais: elimina cualquier número al final
    RTRIM(
        LEFT(
            RIGHT(DB_NAME(), LEN(DB_NAME()) - CHARINDEX('_', DB_NAME())),
            PATINDEX('%[0-9]%', RIGHT(DB_NAME(), LEN(DB_NAME()) - CHARINDEX('_', DB_NAME())) + '0') - 1)    ) AS Pais,
     -- Normalización de Entorno
    CASE 
        WHEN RIGHT(DB_NAME(), 1) LIKE '[0-9]' 
            THEN 'APP' + RIGHT(DB_NAME(), 1)
        WHEN RIGHT(DB_NAME(), LEN(DB_NAME()) - CHARINDEX('_', DB_NAME())) = 'CINES' 
            THEN 'CINES'
        ELSE 'APP'
    END AS Entorno,
    YEAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, GETDATE())) as anio, MONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, GETDATE())) as mes,
 
Procesados.MesTexto,  procesados , 
CASE WHEN aprobados is null THEN 0 ELSE aprobados END as aprobados,
CASE WHEN aprobados is null THEN procesados ELSE procesados-aprobados END as Erroneos,
 
CASE 
    WHEN aprobados IS NULL THEN '0%'
    WHEN aprobados = 0 THEN '100%'
    ELSE 
        FORMAT((procesados - aprobados) * 1.0 / procesados, 'P2', 'es-AR')
    END AS PorcentajeError
 
 
from 
(select DATENAME(mm, convert(varchar,YEAR(t.Fecha))+'-'+ right('00'+convert(varchar,MONTH(t.Fecha)),2) +'-01') as MesTexto,
        COUNT(c.NroCbte) as procesados
        from comprobante as C
        inner join Transaccion as T on (c.CuitId=t.CuitId and c.TransaccionId=t.TransaccionId)
        where year( t.Fecha) = YEAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, GETDATE()))
        and month( t.Fecha) = MONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, GETDATE()))
    group by  DATENAME(mm, convert(varchar,YEAR(t.Fecha))+'-'+ right('00'+convert(varchar,MONTH(t.Fecha)),2) +'-01')
) as Procesados
 
left join 
(select DATENAME(mm, convert(varchar,YEAR(t.Fecha))+'-'+ right('00'+convert(varchar,MONTH(t.Fecha)),2) +'-01') as MesTexto,
        COUNT(c.NroCbte) as Aprobados
        from comprobante as C
        inner join Transaccion as T on (c.CuitId=t.CuitId and c.TransaccionId=t.TransaccionId)
        where year( t.Fecha) = YEAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, GETDATE()))
        and month( t.Fecha) = MONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, GETDATE()))
        and c.Resultado !='R'
    group by  DATENAME(mm, convert(varchar,YEAR(t.Fecha))+'-'+ right('00'+convert(varchar,MONTH(t.Fecha)),2) +'-01')
) as Aprobados
 
on 
procesados.MesTexto= aprobados.MesTexto
